name: Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble and brown the sausage.
2. Add cream style corn to the sausage.
3. Add the dozen eggs to the mixture in the bottom of a dutch oven.
4. Place about 8 briquets on the bottom of an oven and 14 briquets on top.
5. Cook for approximately 30 minutes.
This is great for camping trips. You can bake your biscuits while the eggs are cooking, and everything will come out together.
